text: Being here, the dimness and sharp angles of the first scene press upon my awareness, making me keenly conscious of emptiness and the artificiality of light. The second scene, with its barely discernible wall and the bold letters R+D, suggests ideas of research and progress stilled by darkness. I feel a peculiar mix of curiosity and disquiet—the way spaces devoted to knowledge and innovation become strange and quiet after hours, making me question the essence of activity and silence.
